subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Illumine the vision of Thy servants that they may look upon the pearls of Thy wisdom and knowledge; and do Thou open their ears
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی نور ابصار عبادک لمشاهده لئالی حکمتک و عرفانک ثم اسمعهم ما یجذبهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
